skill.name: social-media-calendar
skill.description: 社媒内容日历 — 输入主题→30天内容规划+各平台适配+发布时间建议
skill.summary: Generate a 30-day social media content plan with platform-specific adaptations and optimal posting time suggestions from a single topic input
skill.author: Hermes-Sedimentary

security_audit.summary: Static analyzer flagged 2 high-severity patterns, both confirmed as false positives after AI review. The 'weak cryptographic algorithm' detection at line 4 is Chinese text in a YAML description field with no cryptographic content whatsoever. The 'high file entropy' flag (6.21 bits) is caused by Chinese UTF-8 multi-byte characters which naturally have higher entropy than ASCII text — the content is clearly readable structured markdown. This skill is a pure content-generation prompt template with no code execution, network access, file system operations, or external dependencies. No prompt injection or malicious intent detected.

content.user_title: Plan Your 30-Day Social Media Content Calendar Instantly
content.value_statement: Struggling to plan consistent social media content across multiple platforms? This skill generates a complete 30-day content calendar with platform-specific adaptations and optimal posting time suggestions from a single topic input.
actual_capabilities: Generate a 30-day content calendar from a single topic or brand theme
Adapt content format and tone for different social media platforms including WeChat, Weibo, and Douyin
Suggest optimal posting times based on platform-specific engagement patterns
Create diverse content types including posts, stories, threads, and engagement prompts
Provide content themes and hashtag recommendations for each scheduled post
Output a structured calendar format ready for review and manual scheduling
limitations: Output is AI-generated and requires human review before publishing to any platform
Does not connect to social media APIs or post content directly to any platform
Content suggestions are based on general best practices, not real-time platform analytics
Primarily optimized for Chinese-language social media ecosystems and content formats

use_cases.title: Small Business Social Media Manager
use_cases.description: A small business owner inputs their product category and receives a complete 30-day posting plan across multiple platforms with varied content types and optimal posting times.

use_cases.title: Freelance Content Creator
use_cases.description: A freelance marketer quickly generates content calendars for multiple clients by inputting each client's brand theme and receiving platform-tailored content schedules.

use_cases.title: Marketing Team Brainstorming
use_cases.description: A marketing team generates initial content ideas for a new campaign launch, then refines the AI suggestions into their final editorial calendar before execution.

prompt_templates.title: Basic 30-Day Calendar
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate a 30-day social media content calendar for the topic [INSERT TOPIC]. Include daily post ideas with platform suggestions and best posting times.

prompt_templates.title: Platform-Specific Multi-Channel Plan
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a 30-day content plan for [INSERT TOPIC] with separate content strategies for WeChat, Weibo, Xiaohongshu, and Douyin. Include best posting times and content format recommendations for each platform.

prompt_templates.title: Product Launch Campaign Calendar
prompt_templates.prompt: Build a 30-day content calendar around the product launch of [INSERT PRODUCT]. Include teaser posts, launch day content, and follow-up engagement posts with suggested hashtags and content formats.

prompt_templates.title: Full Brand Content Strategy
prompt_templates.prompt: Design a comprehensive 30-day social media strategy for [INSERT BRAND/TOPIC]. Include: daily post themes, content formats for each platform, engagement tactics, hashtag strategy, and a weekly content mix breakdown showing the balance of promotional, educational, and engagement content.

output_examples.input: Generate a 30-day social media calendar for a specialty coffee brand
output_examples.output: Day 1: Coffee brewing tips infographic for WeChat Moments — post at 8:00 AM. Day 2: Behind-the-scenes roasting process video for Douyin — post at 12:30 PM. Day 3: Customer spotlight story for Xiaohongshu — post at 9:00 PM. Day 4: New bean arrival announcement with tasting notes for Weibo — post at 10:00 AM. Day 5: Weekend coffee recipe tutorial — post at 3:00 PM.

output_examples.input: Create a one-week content plan for a fitness app launch
output_examples.output: Monday: Teaser countdown post with app interface preview for WeChat Moments. Tuesday: Founder story and app development journey for Xiaohongshu. Wednesday: Early user testimonial video for Douyin. Thursday: Feature spotlight image carousel for Weibo. Friday: Launch day announcement with download link across all platforms. Saturday: Quick 5-minute workout challenge using the app for Douyin. Sunday: Weekly recap and user engagement poll for WeChat.

best_practices: Provide a specific topic, brand name, or industry to get the most relevant and tailored content suggestions
Review and customize all AI-generated content before publishing to ensure it matches your brand voice and messaging
Use the generated calendar as a creative starting framework and add your own ideas, trending topics, and real-time events
anti_patterns: Do not publish AI-generated content directly without human review and brand-specific customization
Do not use the same generated calendar across different brands or clients without significant adaptation for each audience
Do not rely solely on the suggested posting times without testing what actually works for your specific audience and timezone

faq.question: What social media platforms does this skill support?
faq.answer: The skill generates content adapted for major Chinese social platforms including WeChat, Weibo, Xiaohongshu, and Douyin. It can also create plans for global platforms like Instagram and Twitter when requested.

faq.question: Can I use this skill for content in English or other languages?
faq.answer: The skill primarily generates content in Chinese, but you can request output in English or other languages by specifying the language preference in your prompt.

faq.question: Does this skill post content directly to my social media accounts?
faq.answer: No, this skill only generates content plans and post suggestions. You must manually publish the content or use a separate social media scheduling tool.

faq.question: Can I generate a calendar for longer than 30 days?
faq.answer: The skill is optimized for 30-day plans, but you can request longer durations such as 60 or 90 days by specifying the desired timeframe in your prompt.

faq.question: Is the generated content original and safe to publish?
faq.answer: The skill generates original content ideas based on your input topic. You should always review and adapt the suggestions to ensure they are unique and appropriate for your audience.

faq.question: What information do I need to provide to get started?
faq.answer: At minimum, you need to provide a topic, brand name, or industry. More specific inputs like target audience, brand voice, and preferred platforms will produce better results.
